prompt:
A smartphone lying on a bedside table or small desk, its screen showing a stylized notification card with a dUSD coin icon and a small bell or alarm icon, indicating a daily basic income reminder. Next to the phone are a simple analog clock or digital alarm and a notepad with a few scribbles, suggesting that the user has scheduled the reminder to never miss their payout. The notification UI is composed of shapes and icons only, without readable text.

Near-future solarpunk home aesthetic with warm, early-morning or evening lighting and a plant or two nearby. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos and no legible words. The composition should clearly convey “set a daily reminder for your UBI payout” in a friendly, low-stress way.
